usage: PROG [-h]
 {process-pbf,process-dir,sync-dir,augment-region,augment-dir} ...

Build a Hugging Face dataset of OSM polygons with Wikidata, Wikipedia, and Wikivoyage.

positional arguments:
 {process-pbf,process-dir,sync-dir,augment-region,augment-dir}
 process-pbf Process one PBF file
 process-dir Process every PBF in a directory
 sync-dir Converge core and augmentation for every PBF
 augment-region Augment one completed region without reading PBF
 augment-dir Augment every completed core region

options:
 -h, --help show this help message and exit
